value.found_quote: Codex can run subagent workflows by spawning specialized agents in parallel and then collecting their results in one response.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's official Codex docs describing subagents in detail, including a dedicated "Subagents" page. It states "Current Codex releases enable subagent workflows by default," confirming the offering exists and is generally available, with some sub-features (IDE Extension visibility, CSV batch processing) noted as coming soon or experimental.
